reviews.comment:
Pesimo servicio al cliente. Los operarios de YPF se burlan de los clientes. No tienen ganas de trabajar. Deberían rever esto y que haya libro de quejas. Encima es una institución como ACA. No recomiendo esa estacion de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Terrible customer service. The YPF employees mock the customers. They clearly don't want to work. They should review this and implement a complaints book. And on top of that, it's an institution like ACA. I do not recommend this gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpX3EzSWlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No vayan a las 15 hs. Por un cambio de turno te tienen 20 minutos esperando. Es una vergüenza.
Anhelo el día en que las estaciones sean autoservicio, con un sistema tipo SUBE y listo. Pasas, cargas, pagás y te vas.

(Translated by Google)
Don't go at 3 PM. They make you wait 20 minutes for a shift change. It's a disgrace. I long for the day when the stations are self-service, with a SUBE-type system, and that's it. You go in, top up your card, pay, and leave.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpdXFYOHRnRRAB
